description: You are a clinical data scientist maintaining a Python library called `pk_tools` used for pharmacokinetic modeling in a hospital setting. The library simulates drug concentration in blood plasma to help pharmacists determine safe dosages for antibiotics like Vancomycin. The validation team has flagged that the library is producing incorrect results regarding elimination rate calculation, drug accumulation levels across multiple doses, and Area Under the Curve (AUC) calculations. Fix the mathematical and logic errors in the source code located at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/pk_tools` until all tests pass. Generate a corrected simulation report for Patient 732 at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/pk_tools/output/patient_732_sim.csv`. Do not modify the test files or the data file.
